1.gl: to walk (literally or figuratively); causatively, to carry (in various senses)
1.kj: [idiom] again, away, bear, bring, carry (away), come (away), depart, flow, [phrase] follow(-ing), get (away, hence, him), (cause to, made) go (away, -ing, -ne, one's way, out), gro

1.gl: properly, a cliff (or sharp rock, as compressed); generally, a rock or boulder; figuratively, a refuge; also an edge (as precipitous)
1.kj: edge, [idiom] (mighty) God (one), rock, [idiom] sharp, stone, [idiom] strength, [idiom] strong. See also H1049 (בֵּית צוּר).

1.gl: to mar (especially by breaking); figuratively, to split the ears (with sound), i.e. shout (for alarm or joy)
1.kj: blow an alarm, cry (alarm, aloud, out), destroy, make a joyful noise, smart, shout (for joy), sound an alarm, triumph.

1.gl: properly, to creak (or emit a stridulous sound), i.e. to shout (usually for joy)
1.kj: aloud for joy, cry out, be joyful (greatly, make to) rejoice, (cause to) shout (for joy), (cause to) sing (aloud, for joy, out), triumph.

1.gl: Jehovah, Jewish national name of God
1.kj: Jehovah, the Lord. Compare H3050 (יָהּ), H3069 (יְהֹוִה).

2.gl: the face (as the part that turns); used in a great variety of applications (literally and figuratively); also (with prepositional prefix) as a preposition (before, etc.)
2.kj: [phrase] accept, a-(be-) fore(-time), against, anger, [idiom] as (long as), at, [phrase] battle, [phrase] because (of), [phrase] beseech, countenance, edge, [phrase] employ, endure
2.dv: plural (but always as singular) of an unused noun פָּנֶה; from H6437 (פָּנָה));

2.gl: to mar (especially by breaking); figuratively, to split the ears (with sound), i.e. shout (for alarm or joy)
2.kj: blow an alarm, cry (alarm, aloud, out), destroy, make a joyful noise, smart, shout (for joy), sound an alarm, triumph.

2.gl: properly, an extension of the hand, i.e. (by implication) avowal, or (usually) adoration; specifically, a choir of worshippers
to project (one self), i.e. precede; hence, to anticipate, hasten, meet (usually for help)
a song to be accompanied with instrumental music
2.dv: or זָמִר; and (feminine) זְמִרָה; from H2167 (זָמַר);

3.gl: gods in the ordinary sense; but specifically used (in the plural thus, especially with the article) of the supreme God; occasionally applied by way of deference to magistrates; and sometimes as a superlative
3.kj: angels, [idiom] exceeding, God (gods) (-dess, -ly), [idiom] (very) great, judges, [idiom] mighty.

3.gl: great (in any sense); hence, older; also insolent
3.kj: [phrase] aloud, elder(-est), [phrase] exceeding(-ly), [phrase] far, (man of) great (man, matter, thing,-er,-ness), high, long, loud, mighty, more, much, noble, proud thing, [idiom]

3.gl: strength; as adjective, mighty; especially the Almighty (but used also of any deity)
3.kj: God (god), [idiom] goodly, [idiom] great, idol, might(-y one), power, strong. Compare names in '-el.'

3.gl: Jehovah, Jewish national name of God
3.kj: Jehovah, the Lord. Compare H3050 (יָהּ), H3069 (יְהֹוִה).

4.gl: the earth (at large, or partitively a land)
4.kj: [idiom] common, country, earth, field, ground, land, [idiom] natins, way, [phrase] wilderness, world.
4.dv: from an unused root probably meaning to be firm;

4.gl: a mountain or range of hills (sometimes used figuratively)
(only in plural collective) weariness, i.e. (by implication) toil (treasure so obtained) or speed
properly, scrutinized, i.e. (by implication) a recess

5.gl: a sea (as breaking in noisy surf) or large body of water; specifically (with the article), the Mediterranean Sea; sometimes a large river, or an artifical basin; locally, the west, or (rarely) the south
5.dv: from an unused root meaning to roar;

5.gl: to mould into a form; especially as apotter; figuratively, to determine (i.e. form a resolution)
5.kj: [idiom] earthen, fashion, form, frame, make(-r), potter, purpose.
5.dv: probably identical with H3334 (יָצַר) (through the squeezing into shape); (compare H3331 (יַצַע));

6.gl: to kneel; by implication to bless God (as an act of adoration), and (vice-versa) man (as a benefit); also (by euphemism) to curse (God or the king, as treason)
6.kj: [idiom] abundantly, [idiom] altogether, [idiom] at all, blaspheme, bless, congratulate, curse, [idiom] greatly, [idiom] indeed, kneel (down), praise, salute, [idiom] still, thank.

6.gl: to depress, i.e. prostrate (especially reflexive, in homage to royalty or God)
6.kj: bow (self) down, crouch, fall down (flat), humbly beseech, do (make) obeisance, do reverence, make to stoop, worship.

6.gl: to bend the knee; by implication, to sink, to prostrate
6.kj: bow (down, self), bring down (low), cast down, couch, fall, feeble, kneeling, sink, smite (stoop) down, subdue, [idiom] very.

7.gl: a collective name for a flock (of sheep or goats); also figuratively (of men)
7.dv: or צאוֹן; (Psalm 144:13), from an unused root meaning to migrate;

8.dv: from an unused root meaning to be hot;

8.gl: properly, to be dense, i.e. tough or severe (in various applications)
8.kj: be cruel, be fiercer, make grievous, be ((ask a), be in, have, seem, would) hard(-en, (labour), -ly, thing), be sore, (be, make) stiff(-en, (-necked)).

8.gl: the heart (as the most interior organ);
8.kj: [phrase] bethink themselves, breast, comfortably, courage, ((faint), (tender-) heart(-ed), midst, mind, [idiom] unawares, understanding.
8.dv: from H3823 (לָבַב); used also like H3820 (לֵב)

8.gl: not (the qualified negation, used as a deprecative); once (Job 24:25) as a noun, nothing
8.kj: nay, neither, [phrase] never, no, nor, not, nothing (worth), rather than.

8.gl: a pasture (i.e. open field, whither cattle are driven); by implication, a desert; also speech (including its organs)
8.dv: from H1696 (דָבַר) in the sense of driving;

8.gl: a testing, of men (judicial) or of God (querulous)

9.gl: father, in a literal and immediate, or figurative and remote application
9.kj: chief, (fore-) father(-less), [idiom] patrimony, principal. Compare names in 'Abi-'.

9.gl: to test (especially metals); generally and figuratively, to investigate
to test; by implication, to attempt

9.kj: act, deed, do, getting, maker, work.

10.gl: a road (as trodden); figuratively, a course of life or mode of action, often adverb
10.kj: along, away, because of, [phrase] by, conversation, custom, (east-) ward, journey, manner, passenger, through, toward, (high-) (path-) way(-side), whither(-soever).

10.gl: to vacillate, i.e. reel or stray (literally or figuratively); also causative of both
10.kj: (cause to) go astray, deceive, dissemble, (cause to, make to) err, pant, seduce, (make to) stagger, (cause to) wander, be out of the way.

10.gl: the heart (as the most interior organ);
10.kj: [phrase] bethink themselves, breast, comfortably, courage, ((faint), (tender-) heart(-ed), midst, mind, [idiom] unawares, understanding.

10.gl: a people (as a congregated unit); specifically, a tribe (as those of Israel); hence (collectively) troops or attendants; figuratively, a flock

11.gl: to seven oneself, i.e. swear (as if by repeating a declaration seven times)
11.kj: adjure, charge (by an oath, with an oath), feed to the full (by mistake for H7646 (שָׂבַע)), take an oath, [idiom] straitly, (cause to, make to) swear.
11.dv: a primitive root; properly to be complete, but used only as a denominative from H7651 (שֶׁבַע);

11.gl: properly, the nose or nostril; hence, the face, and occasionally a person; also (from the rapid breathing in passion) ire
11.kj: anger(-gry), [phrase] before, countenance, face, [phrase] forebearing, forehead, [phrase] (long-) suffering, nose, nostril, snout, [idiom] worthy, wrath.

11.gl: repose or (adverbially) peacefully; figuratively, consolation (specifically, matrimony); hence (concretely) an abode
11.kj: comfortable, ease, quiet, rest(-ing place), still.
